name_cn:
In stock 🤎【Matte Dark Brown】
miu mi* 2024 Fw Autumn/Winter Suede Tote Bag
Autumn and winter are simply miu's battlefield, absolutely unstoppable~ Adding suede material is simply the god of atmosphere. The low-key and premium brown tone and warm pumpkin tone are super rich with an autumn and winter vibe. The simple yet retro style is also full of aesthetic artistic conception!!️
Style No.: 5BB117
Dimensions: 34x10x23cm 12800811
